subcodes.title: Letter to an unnamed recipient re Mulla Husayn
subcodes.first_line: And when thou desirest to enter that sacred land, purify thy soul and sanctify thy possessions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. و اذا اردت ان تدخل تلک الارض المقدسة فطهر نفسک و طیب ما عندک
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @station of the Manifestation of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @visitation Tablets
